summary: Script is well-written (type hints, error handling, clean separation of concerns), but workflow is incomplete. Critical issues: (1) workflow references fixture files (fixtures/default_config.json, all_ok_config.json, all_expired_config.json) and test file not provided; (2) workflow never generates act-result.txt or implements test harness for parsing/asserting exact output (explicit requirement); (3) actionlint installed at lines 16-18 but never used—confusing and wasteful; (4) pip --break-system-packages (line 11) is problematic; (5) no environment variables defined. Script meets core requirements, but workflow won't execute successfully with `act` due to missing fixtures. Doesn't fulfill stated test-harness requirement.
